---
title: 'I want a Hippopotas for Christmas!!!! http://buff.ly/1PhijYQ #Pokemon #Fan'
date: '2016-06-08T13:03:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4941334312316744427'
blogger_filename: '/2016/06/i-want-hippopotas-for-christmas.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Other'
---

<h3>
I want a <a href="http://buff.ly/1PhijYQ" target="_blank">Hippopotas </a>for Christmas!!!! &nbsp;#Pokemon #Fan</h3>
<br />
OK... so several years ago I decided that the song "I want a Hippopotamus for Christmas" was my favorite Christmas song.<br />
<br />
Then, after learning about Hippos, I decided they were one of my favorite animals.<br />
<br />
This morning, I found a Hippo Pokemon set to the Christmas song... and I just HAD to share!<br />
<br />
<br />
<iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="480" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/tlVPdfaD4Wc" width="640"></iframe>

<br />
<br />
Darrell<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
